---
output: github_document
---

<!-- README.md is generated from README.Rmd. Please edit that file -->

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

# Flexible unimodal density estimation in hidden Markov models

This repository contains code for the simulation experiments and case study presented in the paper "Flexible unimodal density estimation in hidden Markov models". In the paper we discuss flexible, P-spline-based estimation of state-dependent densities in hidden Markov models (HMMs), and how to impose unimodality constraints to make such models more interpretable and robust.

## Overview

* The folder `simulations` contains all code for the two simulation experiments presented in the paper.
* The folder `narwal_case_study` contains code and data for reproducing the case study on narwhal dive data.
* The folder `Tutorial` constains an R markdown script, demonstrating the use of unimodal P-spline-based density estimation in HMMs.
